synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2026-2128 Moderate: Oracle Linux 8 python3 security update
description:
[3.6.8-73.0.1]
- Add Oracle Linux distribution in platform.py [Orabug: 20812544]

[3.6.8.openela.0]
- Add openela to supported dists

[3.6.8-73]
- Security fixes for CVE-2026-0865, CVE-2025-15366, CVE-2025-15367, CVE-2026-1299
Resolves: RHEL-143063, RHEL-143120, RHEL-144860
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2026-2128

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-2128.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 8 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
platform-python-3.6.8-73.0.1.el8_10.i686.rpm
platform-python-3.6.8-73.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
platform-python-debug-3.6.8-73.0.1.el8_10.i686.rpm
platform-python-debug-3.6.8-73.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
platform-python-devel-3.6.8-73.0.1.el8_10.i686.rpm
platform-python-devel-3.6.8-73.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
python3-idle-3.6.8-73.0.1.el8_10.i686.rpm
python3-idle-3.6.8-73.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
python3-libs-3.6.8-73.0.1.el8_10.i686.rpm
python3-libs-3.6.8-73.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
python3-test-3.6.8-73.0.1.el8_10.i686.rpm
python3-test-3.6.8-73.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
python3-tkinter-3.6.8-73.0.1.el8_10.i686.rpm
python3-tkinter-3.6.8-73.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
platform-python-3.6.8-73.0.1.el8_10.aarch64.rpm
platform-python-debug-3.6.8-73.0.1.el8_10.aarch64.rpm
platform-python-devel-3.6.8-73.0.1.el8_10.aarch64.rpm
python3-idle-3.6.8-73.0.1.el8_10.aarch64.rpm
python3-libs-3.6.8-73.0.1.el8_10.aarch64.rpm
python3-test-3.6.8-73.0.1.el8_10.aarch64.rpm
python3-tkinter-3.6.8-73.0.1.el8_10.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol8/SRPMS-updates/python3-3.6.8-73.0.1.el8_10.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-15366
CVE-2025-15367
CVE-2026-0865
CVE-2026-1299




Description of changes:

[3.6.8-73.0.1]
- Add Oracle Linux distribution in platform.py [Orabug: 20812544]

[3.6.8.openela.0]
- Add openela to supported dists

[3.6.8-73]
- Security fixes for CVE-2026-0865, CVE-2025-15366, CVE-2025-15367, CVE-2026-1299
Resolves: RHEL-143063, RHEL-143120, RHEL-144860
